title: Easy enjoyment
description: This modpack offers a set of optimizations and improvements that significantly improve performance The overall goal of this mod pack is to improve the gaming experience, allowing players to enjoy a more optimized game, have access to new features and tools
body:
## Easy enjoyment

This mod pack provides optimization and improved graphics for the game, which will help improve the performance of the gameplay. It also adds useful modifications that can be used both in normal survival mode and on RP servers or regular servers.

The mod pack makes a lot of changes and adds new features to the game. In addition, it has many utilities that will make the gameplay more comfortable and convenient. There will be visible changes and bug fixes.

The mod pack also contains mods such as Litematica and WorldEdit, which are especially useful to map developers, making it easier for them to create and edit the world.

The general idea of the mod pack is to improve the gameplay by optimizing, adding new features and tools, as well as facilitating the processes of creating maps and editing.

---

## ATTENTION
The mod-pack modifies and adds
- optimization 
- multiple functions / multiple buttons / convenient functions
- fixed bugs (and this spoils the vanilla atmosphere)
- graphics improvements

---

You can also play on *weak* PCs with a dedicated memory of at least 2 GB or more

**Easy enjoyment** also has mods for the convenience of the builder during construction

 Why download this Modpack? It can improve the performance and stability of the game, and also offers new possibilities for construction and customization. If you want to enjoy a smoother and better gaming experience, this mod pack may be the perfect choice.


* Before downloading this modpack, it is important to know that you have fabric installed so that the modpack works

* You can also put music in the background using the WaterPlayer mod all details ==> [WaterPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterplayer)
